criteria detail: Comfy riverside eatery in a historic building offering seafood & meat dishes, plus cocktails & beer.
name: Harbour House

criteria detail: Waterside location and two large alfresco terraces, located on Bristol’s beautiful and historic harbourside. Positioned between Bristol Temple Meads station and Millennium Square, the city centre is just a 5-10 minute walk away. There is a pay and display car park within a few meters.
name: Riverstation

criteria detail: Popular Victorian-themed cocktail bar and restaurant on Queen's Road. Taking inspiration from a mythical professor of astronomy
name: The Lost & Found Bristol
